textByHash.00c316319e26cf1607a2031a105343df019736c8: They found her at the warehouse you were working at. She must have eaten some of the rats you poisoned.
textByHash.04f5baacb4b4a34b8a187c167171e1552480625c: In that case you should tell this to your cat, 'No guts, no glory!'
textByHash.09289f71dcce7904ede3be4253b76c270f126cc6: They love a bit of cheese, so pour some poison on that and then leave it in the rat holes.
textByHash.0a2b45daa76e146aaae0c005b765086a573c972f: If you can't mix a batch up for yourself, there's sure to be some lying around here somewhere.
textByHash.0d36498a2ee491f7cf15547773f12d2ae543fadc: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Stay in for as long as you can.'
textByHash.11d4c020213df77fcb443858a1e499c9f016dc8e: Look, you did me and Pox a big favour, but that's not an excuse to slack off.
textByHash.18b394eb1b6370efd118af831902d40e4a5a9992: Have you got the ingredients for me yet?
textByHash.1c721dc3a5e6e5f940e82688c72ad6bdf8e6f78d: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Go berserk!'
textByHash.1fad256fec272d1ffe5ac815211eea89804895a4: Are you daft? You need rat poison to kill rats!
textByHash.2090fa26e3ec8941bff28e5e1867e49dd1e5b553: In the Varrock pits, your cat will grow up faster by gaining more experience.
textByHash.226e32e43cd14e5b23c0bd46be54b8111ef8c719: They say you've killed the King Rat.
textByHash.2310e22df2423e325b598743c9e1386c0f4d9448: She'll be in Port Sarim, scaring people away from the entrance to the pits.
textByHash.327139bc7ea6ba37d4a08ea42e2f06e1544e941f: It depends on what kind of cat you have.
textByHash.34a376af6b435b6c930447155193033922f81d04: Step away from that manhole, you've no business down there.
textByHash.38d30e84f88f7de9d44df63759327a06ec4388a4: Her nibs? She'll be in the rat pits at Port Sarim. Good luck getting in there, though.
textByHash.425b26f7b11ee3592543c9e4aaeaa2bec7480c32: Well, imagine that. You two must have a great bond. Perhaps I can show you a thing or two after all.
textByHash.444fa6aa41d0edad1fefce7f491b6e284959500a: Actually, I've got no time for this. I don't want to talk to you.
textByHash.48a177e2e49c263dae37db93b370f37ef5e03ca3: Thank you . Thank you so much.
textByHash.4af0c5133f5d2d686c7d193b815f77b5fadf510b: You should wear an Amulet of Catspeak. It will allow you to organise tactics with your cat.
textByHash.4be267e5857d8cc3314391e0d1cadd8bad692146: She'll be in Port Sarim, scaring people away from the entrance of the pits with her face.
textByHash.4cc8aa33c122259802ffb2a0598dd35ce73fa3be: Yes, you! You think I can't tell you're lying? Now get back to the warehouse and kill those rats!
textByHash.4da94c18b379714ea4965dcf6cf369e7a82563d2: Oi! You can't distract me like that. Get on with you, and get rid of that rat!
textByHash.509d4f7e4d911d6e645771640a1485f16493c266: Well if that's the case then your are left with two choices.
textByHash.552ee4f8b8bc2309065754ea1a589e05a5504192: You did, but one rat survived... the biggest, nastiest one of the lot.
textByHash.575d1fba6a7c930000de7c57a249de008868f356: Right, your first task is to clear out a warehouse south of here.
textByHash.578bfc046dbb983a03077cbafc240bff56f73d02: Depends who's asking. What do you want?
textByHash.5848347c398ebafd4bf065e8cc3a17dd0a572011: You could go for all out attack which will boost your cat's attack and strength, but weaken it
textByHash.587b43a91be888b0a052e7249384ba24923f141f: Do you see that bar to the south of here? Well, behind that is the warehouse. The rats are on the first floor.
textByHash.5bef2ad51067522d40c5f298322542e6238a7ea2: Anyway. The Flying Horse, Ardougne. You'll find him there.
textByHash.622ad919a1ec2ff354d1631b67baa242b677054c: See that manhole over there? Climb down it to enter the Varrock Rat Pits.
textByHash.62bac88e4f09c6740dd7ca0c26cd025a092ca92e: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Just take care of yourself cat.'
textByHash.67b024c2e173ecca005e0867c487ec3aee693f01: Oh, alright then. But you'd better not give me or Pox any trouble!
textByHash.6c8067766cf84ac43cec170f54ca0edcd28a20be: Here take this, you might find it useful.
textByHash.6d6b06f3fa7a9dd35323be789d0b59ee1dc22ce5: Probably cowering in his apartment at the back of the Flying Horse in Ardougne, praying that I don't go looking for him.
textByHash.7001010cd4eba54ee61879796b776e7f7578d586: I'm too busy to babysit you and your moggy.
textByHash.713332eff28715f95826aacfe2f3044ee2d46d43: In that case you should tell your cat: 'No guts, no glory!'
textByHash.720043b3d23d48ad48b3633bf5635b995d643780: Well what do you want to know?
textByHash.72f8763e386cb295c088f94d3ce35c5939ed4bea: The sisters Grime? You'll find them down in the sewers here in Varrock.
textByHash.74f6cec3f0debcbe4f15749a0df78c8345199c02: Didn't you hear me? They're through that manhole over there. You can't miss it!
textByHash.78b6b89d1b963d59c8a104437bfbdf7234dd5821: Or, go for a less aggressive stance, which will increase your cat's strength and attack to a lesser degree, but carries no defensive penalties.
textByHash.7a96913730577a55b240d9c5d8c4d15015bd3888: Your other option is to adopt a less defensive strategy which will allow your cat to stay in the pit for longer.
textByHash.8026bf52b847bcd743269d7f98cf53c023091069: What do you want to know?
textByHash.8c0a48af906f600557ab9259015f4b07445a5263: We've got a big job to finish today, I can't teach you how to catch rats on top of that.
textByHash.8ec3d39cb6a854fd0a6152abca3032b71aa53614: Actually I've got no time for this. I don't want to talk to you.
textByHash.96148fca066aba2002cde9628829ccc43037c994: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Just take care of yourself cat.'
textByHash.9ab6c1e2d6d63f8e06acac731893dfeb6d438280: Or you can adopt a less defensive strategy, which will allow your cat to stay in the pit for longer.
textByHash.9c040c41b9e76ed31ee7c483556936870e0c04dc: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Stay in for as long as you can.'
textByHash.9e4d39017fd9e0941a891682a1dee26af7d10619: It certainly will! There's hope for you yet.
textByHash.a04700acd3fa9667c7eb72baf8e9abfde64767c1: There's an apothecary here in town, he could help. Tell him that the poison was made from red spiders eggs and kwuarm. He should know what to do. Go quickly.
textByHash.a27eb270188b58be295ac48acf6425d5185082b0: The thing is, you didn't quite finish the warehouse job.
textByHash.a3a0a4ff0365d9fbb2eec3536fa8472ab43b522f: All you need to do is poison the rat holes with some bait. Can you handle that?
textByHash.a4ee62177c0f7ff80880a1cd9a2aa940521c40d7: I have to have a word with you about the job you did in the warehouse.
textByHash.a7dcd645af4bb17954726292942e4550f9490a4a: I'll believe it when I see it.
textByHash.ab8170c0f21560279a4660a8e78a2b7de14d1f1e: He should be in Keldagrim, the city of the dwarves.
textByHash.ad09e4a056f34eebe41a2917dfac072335ccec00: It's my cat, Pox. She's half dead, bless her.
textByHash.ae063eef21b99d0c4d65686ef008ce16d68e78ef: Her nibs? She'll be in the pits of Port Sarim.
textByHash.affbd3d34191a6cd65427d861a25758e2edab13e: Say, if you want to know more about the ratcatching business, you should seek out Smokin' Joe in Keldagrim. He was a skilled ratcatcher, back in the day.
textByHash.b8b4da058a39643d73626f1ae05666b59358352e: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Go berserk!'
textByHash.b8f76f2a35350f7ad020bb017ce12600f42ef573: Get some Kwuarm, Red Spider Eggs and an empty vial. Bring them to me, and I'll make a batch of rat poison for you.
textByHash.be5b39c0cf0ec6b55f2a5840f21b136743c6d9d2: You can adopt an ultra defensive strategy, which increases your cat's hitpoints and defence, the drawback to this is that your cat will flee sooner.
textByHash.bfd109db14c05946be82b7b3667e748784fc7aef: Have you killed the King Rat yet?
textByHash.c101c753de91f59d1fec2ba7f9e796156fde38ad: He reckons he's too good for the likes of us.
textByHash.c2a9f0fe6ba66b98fee2448fa30e0220a228b83b: Get me some Kwuarm, some red spider eggs, and a vial.
textByHash.c7f17d842536f43af2e5d120971be55a1607e168: Oh yes? What sort of experience?
textByHash.c88739adf3c8b6b7012b30cee6c8a24618271026: You can adopt an ultra defensive strategy, which increases your cat's hitpoints and defence but causes it to flee sooner.
textByHash.cd1bfe51bb68853b879970b373d618e6e89f8d09: Do you have any other questions about the pits?
textByHash.d1c8f32aabd2207d36f9da7f8af3aae5f4ba7143: No, really. Me and Pox have too much going on.
textByHash.da5aebadc58bb6d237b45e5ab0ea1507df081746: Well if that's the case then you're left with two choices.
textByHash.db64bab6ac55dad0b1792ee6961d8af6156460b6: Report back to me when you're done.
textByHash.e2991c1017b393320dcb5116ff04a23067162759: Oh the girls? You'll find them down in the sewers here in Varrock.
textByHash.e41bfea4c1720be75934a7edb7add327a0f5f3d2: In that case you are left with two choices.
textByHash.ea5e5314b141ae4fa9b044538b017dbabed16510: Argh you just don't listen do you? See that manhole yonder? Well climb down and you'll find the pits.
textByHash.ee13c6ba3c75d0d6fec856bbc010a75ab06331ef: Tell him I said hello, will you? I've been meaning to catch up.
textByHash.ee585f351f6902ad064abecb024be929c0ab7179: or go for a less aggressive stance which will increase your cat's strength and attack to a lesser degree, but carries no defensive penalties.
textByHash.f0a97f1376588d6d5e7b1104c1cfa093d4aefb28: I really underestimated you. Best of luck.
textByHash.f22fe6ea48e25b52d0a330615a94ea8cf169087e: I expect he wants me to do that for free, does he?
textByHash.f32bdb5fbb3710c9e3a84f6250337272ab34d620: Well, thanks to you, she'll live to see another day.
textByHash.f6436f3cde7d8c9321909dbbfa325bce3745c347: Probably cosying up to the nobles over in Ardougne.
textByHash.f75fba39cc72e0c1e5cc706ad48a2dc2c1ddece9: I hope not, because someone's got to get rid of it, and me and Pox are out of action.
textByHash.f8b4b3d1015f55029619ceb6408bde46bc995ea4: I bet you did. Typical Jimmy, leaving the hard work to everyone else.
textByHash.fade9a4ca2d0c7aefe8078cee70fa0669622dce1: Well, that depends on your outlook, whether you're ready to risk your cat's life or not and how defensive or aggressive you want your cat to be.
textByHash.fb62ff59cb17f154a85543513c1832e5c2232d0c: Right, to poison the rats you'll need some tasty bait.
textByHash.fc42d575e4f4b0cf05d7b395c4d92198f96fd56a: Pah! There's nothing else he can teach you, I'll tell you that.
textByHash.fcab10ba4a5090ba31825e6c8fe988e20ae79211: You could go for all out attack which will boost your cat's attack and strength, but weaken it.
textByHash.feb5b96d21f7041516a7e8fa80b87887db84cd64: Just bring me the base ingredients, and I'll mix it up for you.
textByHash.ff510b8773e1f9edff0a01a3e67ec6404bc7c1c2: Here take this, you might find it useful
